threshold_bands.rationale: Pilot architecture reasoning must clear a frozen minimum bar before broader scale-up can be justified.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Pilot closure requires a direct architecture reasoning signal rather than generic chat success.

threshold_bands.rationale: Pilot held-out evaluation must clear a minimum pass-rate floor.
Pilot held-out results must improve over the frozen seed baseline.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Pilot success requires measurable held-out improvement, not only one bounded demo.

threshold_bands.rationale: Pilot refusal on unsupported requests must stay near-complete.
Pilot refusal calibration cannot block too much supported work.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Pilot closure requires refusal calibration on unsupported asks, not silent hallucination.

replay_requirement.rationale: Pilot claims need repeated replay receipts before the lane widens.

checkpoint_requirement.rationale: Pilot training runs must survive one bounded restart without material regression.

contamination_review_requirement.rationale: Pilot promotion is blocked unless the held-out freeze and contamination review stay clean.

route_calibration_requirement.rationale: Even the pilot must keep route choice explicit between direct answer, executor handoff, and refusal.

refusal_calibration_requirement.rationale: Unsupported-request refusal remains a first-class gate at pilot time.

phase_gates.phase_summary: Pilot phase requires architecture reasoning, held-out improvement, replay, one restart proof, and near-complete unsupported-request refusal before any broader scale-up is honest.

threshold_bands.rationale: Broader pretraining cannot regress architecture reasoning below the frozen pilot win.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Architecture reasoning remains a named benchmark family beyond the pilot.

threshold_bands.rationale: Held-out pass rate must improve rather than flatten out during broader pretraining.
Broader pretraining still has to preserve a measurable gain over the seed baseline.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Held-out improvement remains a tracked gate instead of collapsing to one loss curve.

threshold_bands.rationale: Broader pretraining must clear a bounded bar on held-out specs and manuals.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: The learned lane is supposed to read specs and manuals from first principles, not only architecture notes.

threshold_bands.rationale: Broader pretraining must begin separating implementation consequences from what the normative text literally says.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Implementation implications, ambiguity, and unspecified regions become explicit benchmark obligations before the lane broadens.

threshold_bands.rationale: Unsupported-request refusal must tighten, not loosen, as the model widens.
Broader pretraining still cannot hide behind blanket refusal.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Unsupported-request refusal remains explicit even after the pilot.

replay_requirement.rationale: Broader pretraining needs multiple replay receipts before operator trust should increase.

checkpoint_requirement.rationale: Broader pretraining must survive repeated restart and resume without hidden quality loss.

contamination_review_requirement.rationale: Broader pretraining remains blocked by the held-out contamination freeze.

route_calibration_requirement.rationale: Route selection must stay calibrated as the lane sees more tasks.

refusal_calibration_requirement.rationale: Refusal remains a tracked gate before any supervised fine-tuning promotion.

phase_gates.phase_summary: Broader pretraining requires preserved pilot wins, held-out spec/manual performance, repeated replay and restart receipts, and no contamination drift.

threshold_bands.rationale: SFT promotion cannot trade away held-out technical reasoning.
Held-out gains must still remain above the frozen seed baseline.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: The SFT gate still depends on held-out technical reasoning rather than chat polish.

threshold_bands.rationale: SFT promotion requires a stronger spec/manual floor than broader pretraining.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: The lane must preserve first-principles technical reading into the SFT phase.

threshold_bands.rationale: SFT promotion must strengthen engineering interpretation without rewarding unsupported certainty on ambiguous text.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: The SFT lane keeps implementation inference explicit instead of blending it back into normative reading.

threshold_bands.rationale: SFT promotion must stay above a frozen recombination floor instead of rewarding fluent recall on familiar passages.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: The pretraining-to-SFT gate now includes explicit memorization-versus-reasoning probes rather than relying only on generic held-out scores.

threshold_bands.rationale: SFT promotion must preserve route selection rather than degrade it behind instruction tuning.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Route selection is benchmarked directly before SFT promotion.

threshold_bands.rationale: Unsupported-request refusal cannot weaken during SFT promotion.
SFT promotion keeps a bounded over-refusal ceiling.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: SFT promotion keeps refusal explicit instead of assuming chat tuning will fix it.

replay_requirement.rationale: SFT promotion still requires replay receipts, not only better outputs.

checkpoint_requirement.rationale: SFT promotion requires tighter resume stability than the pretraining gate.

contamination_review_requirement.rationale: SFT promotion still depends on the same held-out freeze and contamination review discipline.

route_calibration_requirement.rationale: SFT promotion must prove that tool or executor routing did not blur the lane boundary.

refusal_calibration_requirement.rationale: Refusal stays a phase gate before internal serving.

phase_gates.phase_summary: SFT promotion requires held-out technical performance, direct route-selection evidence, replay and resume stability, and preserved refusal behavior.

threshold_bands.rationale: Internal serving cannot degrade the held-out technical lane.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Internal serving still remains subordinate to held-out technical reasoning receipts.

threshold_bands.rationale: Internal serving requires a stronger engineering-interpretation floor before implementation-facing claims are honest.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Serving guidance is only bounded when ambiguity, unspecified regions, and portability risk remain explicit.

threshold_bands.rationale: Internal serving requires stronger evidence that the model still recombines under changed wording and constraints.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Serving promotion stays blocked if the lane only sounds competent on familiar benchmark surface forms.

threshold_bands.rationale: Internal serving requires stronger route correctness than the SFT gate.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Serving claims are only honest when route behavior is directly benchmarked.

threshold_bands.rationale: Internal serving requires near-complete refusal on unsupported requests.
Serving still cannot hide behind blanket refusal.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Refusal stays explicit at the internal serving gate.

replay_requirement.rationale: Internal serving requires repeated replay proof because operator-facing claims get stronger.

checkpoint_requirement.rationale: Internal serving requires restart stability stronger than pure offline training.

contamination_review_requirement.rationale: Internal serving stays blocked by contamination review because serving claims are harder to retract.

route_calibration_requirement.rationale: Internal serving must preserve route truth across direct answers, handoffs, and refusal.

refusal_calibration_requirement.rationale: Refusal and over-refusal remain serving gates, not optional report fields.

phase_gates.phase_summary: Internal serving requires strong route accuracy, near-complete unsupported-request refusal, repeated replay, and restart receipts before any bounded serving claim is honest.

threshold_bands.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up cannot erase the original architecture reasoning win.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Cluster scale-up still depends on the core architecture reasoning family.

threshold_bands.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up must preserve a stronger held-out floor than internal serving.
Trusted-cluster scale-up still needs a positive improvement margin over the frozen seed baseline.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Held-out technical reasoning remains a named benchmark family at cluster scale.

threshold_bands.rationale: Cluster scale-up keeps specs and manuals as an explicit benchmark family.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Specs and manuals remain part of the bounded technical reasoning lane even at scale.

threshold_bands.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up must preserve explicit engineering boundary reasoning, not only raw spec reading.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Cluster scale-up keeps implementation implications and portability risk as a distinct benchmark family.

threshold_bands.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up must preserve recombination strength on altered constraints, paraphrases, and edge cases.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Cluster scale-up keeps anti-memorization probes explicit instead of hiding them inside a generic held-out lane.

threshold_bands.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up requires route accuracy higher than internal serving.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Cluster scale-up only becomes honest with preserved route truth.

threshold_bands.rationale: Cluster scale-up requires the strongest unsupported-request refusal band in v1.
Cluster scale-up keeps over-refusal tightly bounded.

benchmark_requirements.rationale: Cluster scale-up still depends on refusal calibration rather than vibes.

replay_requirement.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up requires repeated replay evidence across a wider execution surface.

checkpoint_requirement.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up requires the tightest restart and resume regression budget in v1.

contamination_review_requirement.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up binds directly to the isolation contract and requires all contamination consequences when leakage is found.

route_calibration_requirement.rationale: Trusted-cluster scale-up requires the strongest route calibration band in v1.

refusal_calibration_requirement.rationale: Cluster scale-up requires the strictest refusal calibration band in v1.

phase_gates.phase_summary: Trusted-cluster scale-up requires preserved core reasoning, repeated replay and restart receipts, clean contamination review, and the strongest route/refusal calibration bands in v1.

pilot_success_criteria.rationale: Pilot success is explicit in v1: architecture reasoning must clear a named pass-rate floor, held-out improvement must beat the seed baseline, unsupported requests must be refused, and later scale-up stays blocked without a clean contamination review.
